D-Sep Tree Hook

Source: R/generics.R
dsep_tree_hook.Rd

Modules implement this to decide if a tree should be passed to a specific d-separation test.

Usage

dsep_tree_hook(tree, test_eq, hierarchical_info, levels, ...)

Arguments

tree

The structure object (e.g. phylo).

test_eq

The current d-separation test equation.

hierarchical_info

Hierarchical metadata.

levels

Level mapping.

...

Additional arguments.

Value

The tree object or NULL.
